reviews.comment:
Me gustó un lugar cálido con muchos Árboles !! Venís cansado y bajas a tomar fresco cargar NAFTA y está protegido !! Los baños cuidados

(Translated by Google)
I loved the warm atmosphere with lots of trees! You come in tired and stop to get some fresh air, fill up your tank, and it's all protected! The restrooms are well-maintained.
